title: You are review. Analyze the GitHub issue and return ONLY valid JSON with keys: risk (LOW|MEDIUM|HIGH), approve (boolean), findings (array of strings), recommendation (string), rationale (string). Issue Title: t Issue Body: b Return ONLY valid JSON.
summary_text: {"risk":"MEDIUM","approve":false,"findings":["The issue title/body are placeholders only ('t', 'b') and contain no actionable problem statement.","No reproduction steps, expected behavior, observed behavior, or impact description are provided.","No affected version/environment, stack trace, logs, or references are included, so scope and risk cannot be assessed."],"recommendation":"Reject pending clarification; request a complete rewrite with clear summary, affected area, environment, reproducible steps, expected vs actual results, and any relevant logs/screenshots.","rationale":"The report is non-actionable as written and cannot be validated, prioritized, or assigned; additional details are required before review or implementation can begin."}
